case_title: WILSON, YVONNE vs. CARLIN, KELLEY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILSON, YVONNE AS TO DEFENDANT CARLIN, KELLEY RAVANAL, CHRIS DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
